title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say why it might be important for the people to do these things accurately, and how difficult being accurate might be for them.

images.label: A
images.description: A scientist or lab technician in a white coat using a precision pipette to move liquid between glass tubes in a laboratory setting.

images.label: B
images.description: A pastry chef meticulously placing small, delicate decorations onto a high-end gourmet cake with extreme focus.

followUp.question: In which activity do you think being accurate might matter the least? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say how the people might have prepared for these activities and how they might be feeling.

images.label: D
images.description: A group of people wearing helmets and life jackets, white-water rafting through intense rapids on a river.

images.label: E
images.description: A person relaxing peacefully in an outdoor thermal pool or hot spring with steam rising from the water.

followUp.question: Which experience do you think will be the most memorable? (Why?)
